20	        return parsed.protocol === "https:";

31	 */
32	export const NostrProfileSchema = z.object({
33	  /** Username (NIP-01: name) - max 256 chars */
34	  name: z.string().max(256).optional(),
35	
36	  /** Display name (NIP-01: display_name) - max 256 chars */
37	  displayName: z.string().max(256).optional(),
38	
39	  /** Bio/description (NIP-01: about) - max 2000 chars */
40	  about: z.string().max(2000).optional(),
41	
42	  /** Profile picture URL (must be https) */
43	  picture: safeUrlSchema.optional(),
44	
45	  /** Banner image URL (must be https) */
46	  banner: safeUrlSchema.optional(),
47	
48	  /** Website URL (must be https) */
49	  website: safeUrlSchema.optional(),
50	
51	  /** NIP-05 identifier (e.g., "user@example.com") */
52	  nip05: z.string().optional(),
53	
54	  /** Lightning address (LUD-16) */
55	  lud16: z.string().optional(),
56	});
57

63	export const NostrConfigSchema = z.object({
64	  /** Account name (optional display name) */
65	  name: z.string().optional(),
66	
67	  /** Optional default account id for routing/account selection. */
68	  defaultAccount: z.string().optional(),
69	
70	  /** Whether this channel is enabled */
71	  enabled: z.boolean().optional(),
72	
73	  /** Markdown formatting overrides (tables). */
74	  markdown: MarkdownConfigSchema,
75

| `src/types.ts` | Three interfaces: `PulseBoardAccount` (boardUrl, apiToken, username), `PulseBoardConfig` (accounts map), `PulseBoardMessage` (id, boardId, authorId, content, timestamp) |
| `src/runtime.ts` | `createPluginRuntimeStore<PluginRuntime>` from `openclaw/plugin-sdk/runtime-store`; exports `getPulseBoardRuntime` and `setPulseBoardRuntime` with the error message `"PulseBoard runtime not initialized"` |
| `src/channel.ts` | `pulseBoardPlugin` built with `createChatChannelPlugin`; imports `getChatChannelMeta` per SDK pattern (meta is a direct object literal since `"pulseboard"` isn't a registered `ChatChannelId` yet); includes all required adapters as stubs |

### Key decisions (per PLAN.md)

- **`meta`** is a direct object literal (all required `ChannelMeta` fields: `id`, `label`, `selectionLabel`, `docsPath`, `blurb`) — calling `getChatChannelMeta("pulseboard")` would fail at both compile time and runtime since `"pulseboard"` isn't in `ChatChannelId`
- **`getChatChannelMeta`** is imported with an explanatory comment per the requirement; the `extensions/` directory is in Oxlint's `ignorePatterns` and TypeScript's `noUnusedLocals` is not enabled, so no lint/type errors
- **`ChannelId`** — `"pulseboard"` is directly assignable via the `string & {}` branch of `ChannelId = ChatChannelId | (string & {})`
- **`outbound`** uses the flat form with `attachChannelToResult("pulseboard", { to, messageId })`, matching the Nostr pattern
